title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MACALANG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DASOL, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5283 / 53 OG No. 16, 5143 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1707, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MACALANG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DASOL, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Macalang, Pantol, Tapac and Pagdagaan, Municipality of Dasol, Province of Pangasinan, are constituted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Macalang.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
